import collections

class FreqStack:

    def __init__(self):
        self.counts = collections.defaultdict(int)
        self.freq_stacks = collections.defaultdict(list)
        self.max_freq = 0

    def push(self, val: int) -> None:
        self.counts[val] += 1
        current_freq = self.counts[val]
        self.freq_stacks[current_freq].append(val)
        self.max_freq = max(self.max_freq, current_freq)

    def pop(self) -> int:
        val_to_pop = self.freq_stacks[self.max_freq].pop()
        self.counts[val_to_pop] -= 1
        if not self.freq_stacks[self.max_freq]:
            self.max_freq -= 1
        return val_to_pop
